MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-20-2018 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT MATTHEW NUDELMAN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/TLJ)
